name: forge-studio
description: Harness-aligned Claude Code marketplace: behavioral steering, context management, memory architecture, evaluation, orchestration, and multi-agent decomposition.
harness_thesis: Agent = Model + Harness. Changing only the harness can move a system from outside top-30 to top-5 on benchmarks. This marketplace implements the 7 harness components as composable plugins.

plugins.name: behavioral-core
plugins.description: Behavioral steering via modular hooks: anti-sycophancy, destructive command blocking, self-review enforcement, scope discipline

plugins.name: context-engine
plugins.description: Context management: progressive pressure tracking, session handoffs, drift detection, edit safety, large-file warnings

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Three-tier memory architecture: pointer index, on-demand topics, searchable transcripts

plugins.name: evaluator
plugins.description: Evaluator-optimizer pattern: adversarial review, verification, static analysis gates, postmortems

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Orchestration patterns: task routing, explore-plan-implement cycle, daily rituals

plugins.name: agents
plugins.description: Multi-agent decomposition: planner/generator/reviewer triad with tool-isolated capability boundaries

plugins.name: reference
plugins.description: Power-user reference: extended thinking, unix pipes, parallel execution patterns
